arts.ttl: Bologna vs. Inter, a big showdown
arts.sum: After a run of eight consecutive away wins with seven clean sheets, Inter have only won once in their last six away games in Serie A in 2024/25 (D3 L2), keeping just one clean sheet in the process; considering their last six away games in the competition, nine teams have won more points than the Nerazzurri. In this championship Dan Ndoye has scored eight goals, seven of which were in home games, including five in his last four such matches; the last Bologna player to score in five consecutive home games in Serie A was Giuseppe Signori between January and May 1999 (six in that case).

arts.ttl: McTominay meets Conte's demand and lifts Napoli level with Serie A leader Inter
arts.sum: McTominay’s late header secured a 1-0 win at last-placed Monza on Saturday to pull Napoli level with Serie A leader Inter Milan. Earlier, 13th-placed Como won at relegation-threatened Lecce 3-0 for its third straight victory — virtually assuring Cesc Fabregas’ team of a second consecutive season in the top flight for the first time since the 1980s.
